situation: audit-2026-07-02-007 finding AE2-H-001: latest.json checkpoint hardcoded /mnt/e/x-tool (Windows WSL path). On Linux native, resume-checkpoint.py would inject recovery directives pointing to non-existent paths, breaking the recovery chain. should_resume() only checked age < 24h, not cwd/platform match.
action: Added is_cross_platform_stale() validator to resume-checkpoint.py. Checks checkpoint.cwd and checkpoint.project against current PROJECT_DIR (normalized). Mismatch → should_resume returns False → only firmware injected, no broken recovery directive. Route-fix per audit kind.
outcome_evidence: Commit pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-engine-1782975771. Worktree file contains is_cross_platform_stale() function + should_resume() integration verified via grep.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: AE2-H-002 (L2 heartbeat interval inconsistency across docs — direction-shift, touches SKILL.md public interface)
